summary: Safran SA expects to hit the top end of its guidance range for this year after first-quarter sales surpassed expectations, buoyed by a strong civil engines market.

title: Africa Nations Tout $46 Billion Projects at Investment Summit
title_cn: 非洲国家在投资峰会上宣传 460 亿美元的项目
summary: The Africa Finance Corp. is hosting an infrastructure investment summit in the Kenyan capital, where nations are promoting big-ticket projects including railways, airports and renewable power worth at least $45.8 billion.

title: Boston Consulting Group Says AI Work Brought 25% of 2025 Revenue
title_cn: 波士顿咨询集团表示，人工智能工作带来了 2025 年收入的 25%
summary: Boston Consulting Group said its artificial intelligence services work generated 25% of its revenue in 2025 as the firm hires more engineers and other specialists to help advise clients on how to fold such technology into their businesses.

title: Trump’s Drug Pricing Policy Deprives Patients in Europe of New Treatments

title_cn: 昂贵的原油可能会给印度卢比带来压力，引发更多的资金外流
summary: The rupee may lag peers as the RBI is expected to buy dollars to rebuild reserves.

title: Andreessen, Thrive Poised for Windfall From SpaceX’s Cursor Bid
title_cn: 安德森 (Andreessen) 有望从 SpaceX 的 Cursor 竞购中获得意外之财
summary: Andreessen Horowitz and Thrive Capital are poised for a multibillion-dollar windfall from their early investments in Cursor if Elon Musk’s SpaceX moves forward with an agreement to acquire the artificial intelligence coding startup for $60 billion. Andreessen Horowitz is the largest outside shareholder in the startup, with a roughly 10% stake that would be worth about $6 billion at the estimated transaction price, according people familiar with the matter. The venture firm backed Cursor multiple

title: Asia Centric: Singapore Bets Big on AI, Equity Market Reforms
title_cn: 以亚洲为中心：新加坡大力投资人工智能和股票市场改革
summary: Singapore’s stability and business-friendly environment have long made it the regional hub of choice for tech giants such as Amazon, Google and ByteDance. However, the city-state’s traditional role as a bridge between East and West is under pressure. Rising protectionism, technological decoupling and a global retreat from free trade now threaten the open flows of capital that built its wealth.

title: Yuan to Surpass Yen in Currency Options Trading, LCH Says
title_cn: LCH表示，人民币在货币期权交易中将超越日元
summary: The yuan is on track to overtake the yen as the second-most traded currency against the dollar in the foreign-exchange options market, according to London-based clearing house LCH.

title: Stocks, Bonds Fall as Oil Stays Above $100 on Iran: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 伊朗石油价格维持在 100 美元以上，股市和债券下跌：市场总结
summary: Stocks and bonds dropped as stalled US-Iran talks and the continued closure of the Strait of Hormuz drove oil prices higher, souring risk sentiment after a record rally on Wall Street.

title: Oil Extends Gain as Peace Negotiations Between US and Iran Stall
title_cn: 美国和伊朗之间的和平谈判陷入僵局，油价扩大涨幅
summary: Oil rose for a fourth day as the US and Iran remained locked in a battle for control of the Strait of Hormuz after failing to meet for a fresh round of peace talks.

title: Nestlé Sales Rise as Snacks and Coffee Outweigh Recall Hit
title_cn: 由于零食和咖啡的影响超过了召回的影响，雀巢销售额上升
summary: Nestlé SA showed resilient sales growth in the first quarter, helping the Swiss foodmaker contain the fallout from the largest product recall in its history.

title: Stock Futures Fall, Pound Weakens on Talks Uncertainty
title_cn: 股票期货下跌，英镑因谈判不确定性而走软

title: Nokia Earnings Beat Estimates as AI Pivot Shows Promise
title_cn: AI Pivot 显示前景，诺基亚盈利超出预期
summary: Nokia Oyj reported first-quarter adjusted profit that beat analyst forecasts, as the Finnish mobile network equipment maker’s push into artificial intelligence and cloud infrastructure begins to pay off.

title: SET President: IPO Pipeline Faces a Difficult Situation
title_cn: SET主席：IPO管道面临困难
summary: Stock Exchange of Thailand President Asadej Kongsiri discussed the IPO pipeline, saying it is in a difficult situation. He also noted that the Thai exchange plans to introduce “mini-gold” futures. He spoke with Haslinda Amin on Bloomberg Insight. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indonesia Rupiah Falls Most in Seven Months on Rising Oil Prices
title_cn: 油价上涨导致印尼盾七个月来最大跌幅
summary: The Indonesian rupiah declined by the most in seven months as rising oil prices hurt sentiment for the nation’s assets, as Bank Indonesia signal that they have increased intervention efforts.

title: Modi Seeks to Win Key India State After Voter Rolls Purged
title_cn: 选民名册被清洗后，莫迪寻求赢得印度关键邦
summary: Just two weeks before voters in India’s eastern state of West Bengal were due to go to the polls, about 9 million names were removed from the registered roll, causing an uproar among opposition groups.

title: Indonesia Sells Biggest Samurai Bond Since 2024 on Firm Demand
title_cn: 印尼因需求旺盛发行自 2024 年以来最大规模的武士债券
summary: Indonesia raised ¥172.1 billion ($1.1 billion) in its biggest Samurai bond sale in two years as strong investor demand for its credit outweighed concerns about budgetary pressures due to the Middle East war.

title: Hyundai Motor Misses Estimates as Geopolitical Headwinds Hit
title_cn: 地缘政治逆风袭来，现代汽车业绩未达预期
summary: Hyundai Motor Co. first-quarter earnings missed estimates, as South Korea’s largest automaker grappled with US tariffs and cooling demand in key markets.

title: Roche First-Quarter Sales Drop, Hurt by Copycats and Currencies
title_cn: 罗氏第一季度销售额下降，受到模仿者和货币的打击
summary: Roche Holding AG reported declining sales for the first quarter, hurt by competition for its older medicines and the Swiss franc’s appreciation against the dollar.

title: JPMorgan to Add Philippine Bonds to Key EM Index in 2027
title_cn: 摩根大通将于 2027 年将菲律宾债券纳入主要新兴市场指数
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. said it will add local-currency bonds from the Philippines into its widely followed emerging-market index early next year, a move that may draw foreign investment and help spur the nation’s economy.

title: Big Bet on Orban’s Exit Came From Center of His Family’s Empire
title_cn: 欧尔班退出的大赌注来自其家族帝国的中心
summary: An asset-management fund in the Equilor group of companies part-owned by Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban’s son-in-law profited from financial-market bets on the strongman losing power.

title: Vietnam’s GSM Taxi Plans to Hold IPO in 2028, Founder Says
title_cn: 创始人称越南 GSM 出租车计划于 2028 年进行 IPO
summary: Vietnam’s ride-hailing taxi Green & Smart Mobility JSC, which is owned by the country’s richest man, plans an initial public offering in the second half of 2028, according to founder Pham Nhat Vuong.

title: How the Mideast War is Affecting the Trump-Xi Meeting
title_cn: 中东战争如何影响特习会
summary: Myron Brilliant, former Executive Vice President of the US Chamber of Commerce, says the Middle East conflict is adding uncertainty to the planned Trump-Xi meeting. Chinese officials are reportedly frustrated by the lack of progress and clear direction for the summit, and they remain concerned about President Trump’s unpredictability. However, Brilliant still expects the summit to happen. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pakistan Rushes to Buy LNG From Spot Market to Ease Gas Shortage
title_cn: 巴基斯坦急于从现货市场购买液化天然气以缓解天然气短缺
summary: Pakistan is looking to buy liquefied natural gas from the expensive spot market for the first time in over two years as the government rushes to ease an energy shortfall triggered by the conflict in the Middle East.

title: Sinking TSMC ADR Premium Offers Trading Window, UBS Desk Says
title_cn: 瑞银柜台表示，台积电 ADR 溢价提供交易窗口
summary: The narrowing gap between Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.’s Taiwanese shares and its US-listed stock is creating a new trading opportunity, according to a UBS Group AG client note.

title: Five Reasons Global Markets Are Holding Up Despite War in Iran
title_cn: 尽管伊朗发生战争，全球市场仍坚挺的五个原因
summary: Nearly two months into the conflict in Iran, global stock markets are staging a defiant rally. From the US to Taiwan and South Korea, a disconnect has emerged: while the geopolitical tensions remain high, equities are charging back toward all-time highs.

title: Singapore Airlines Deepens Role at Air India Amid Record Losses
title_cn: 新加坡航空在创纪录的亏损中深化与印度航空的合作
summary: Singapore Airlines Ltd. is deepening its operational involvement in Air India Ltd., as the carrier battles record losses and recent safety lapses draw increasing concern, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Trampled Underfoot by a Stampede of Unicorns
title_cn: 被独角兽踩踏
summary: The valuations behind a string of planned IPOs could drain life from stock indexes.

title: Hormuz Traffic Grinds to a Halt After Iran Seizes First Vessels
title_cn: 伊朗扣押第一艘船只后，霍尔木兹交通陷入瘫痪
summary: Traffic through the Strait of Hormuz ground to a halt on Thursday after Iran fired on commercial ships and said it had seized at least two vessels — a first in nearly eight weeks of war.

title: AI Optimism Drives Korean Stocks to Record | The Asia Trade 4/23/2026
title_cn: 人工智能乐观情绪推动韩国股市创历史新高亚洲贸易 2026 年 4 月 23 日
summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Sydney with Haidi Stroud-Watts and Paul Allen, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gotion Founder on US Expansion, Supply Chains, and Industry Competition
title_cn: 国轩创始人谈美国扩张、供应链和行业竞争
summary: Gotion High-tech Founder Li Zhen tells Bloomberg about the battery maker's growth outlook. He also discusses US expansion plans, the Iran war's impact on supply chains, and fierce industry "involution." He spoke exclusively with Bloomberg's Minmin Low. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Copper Falls From Highest Since February With Iran War in Limbo
title_cn: 由于伊朗战争悬而未决，铜价从二月份以来的最高点下跌
summary: Copper fell with other metals as investors watched for the next major developments from the Middle East after peace talks stalled, with the US and Iran both vying for control of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: No Deadline for Iran Proposal Amid Hormuz Standoff: US
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡对峙中伊朗提案没有最后期限：美国
summary: The US and Iran are locked in a battle for control of the Strait of Hormuz after failing to meet for a fresh round of peace talks, with both sides blocking the waterway to gain leverage during an extended ceasefire. Bloomberg's Joumanna Bercetche reports from Dubai. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Boom Sparks Rush Into Chinese Optical Stocks as Top Trade
title_cn: 人工智能热潮引发中国光学股成为热门交易
summary: Chinese optical stocks are attracting growing investor interest on expectations that rising demand for optical components critical to artificial intelligence will drive the next leg of sector outperformance.

title: SoftBank Seeks $10 Billion Loan Backed by OpenAI Shares
title_cn: 软银寻求 OpenAI 股票支持的 100 亿美元贷款
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. is seeking a $10 billion loan secured by its shares in US artificial intelligence giant OpenAI, people familiar with the matter said, as it takes on more debt for founder Masayoshi Son's push into AI. Bloomberg's Trista Xinyi Luo reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Falls as US-Iran Maritime Standoff Heightens Inflation Risk
title_cn: 美伊海上僵局加剧通胀风险，金价下跌
summary: Gold declined as the US extension of a ceasefire with Iran left global markets grappling with a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, impacting energy security and keeping inflation risks high.

title: China’s Factory Hub Faces Gas Price Shock as War Tightens Supply
title_cn: 由于战争导致供应紧张，中国工厂中心面临天然气价格冲击
summary: The Chinese industrial hub of Guangdong, an economic powerhouse comparable in size to South Korea, has seen some electricity prices almost double due in part to constraints on the supply of natural gas from the Middle East.

title: TSMC Says ASML’s Latest Chipmaking Gear Is Too Pricey
title_cn: 台积电称 ASML 最新芯片制造设备太贵
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. will hold off on deploying ASML Holding NV’s most cutting-edge lithography machines for chip production through 2029 to save money. The chipmaker has no plans to adopt ASML’s latest high numerical aperture extreme ultraviolet lithography machines, or high-NA EUV, which fetch upwards of €350 million ($410 million) apiece. TSMC is ASML’s largest customer, according to Bloomberg’s supply chain data. Bloomberg’s Neil Campling reports.

title: Australia’s Biggest Bank to Cut 120 More Jobs Amid AI Push
title_cn: 澳大利亚最大银行将在人工智能推动下再裁员 120 人
summary: Commonwealth Bank of Australia will eliminate around 120 roles amid a broader push to harness artificial intelligence at the nation’s largest lender.

title: Taiwan Banks to Build Own AI Model to Rival Global Giants
title_cn: 台湾银行将建立自己的人工智能模型以与全球巨头竞争
summary: Taiwan is launching a project to develop a large language model for its finance sector, seeking to strengthen its local firms and bypass the limitations of global AI platforms that often lack the nuance of domestic regulations and market practices.

title: SK Hynix’s Profit Surge Falls Short as ‘Supercycle’ Debate Rages
title_cn: 随着“超级周期”争论的激烈，SK海力士的利润激增未能实现
summary: SK Hynix Inc. reported a five-fold jump in quarterly profit that yet failed to impress investors questioning how long booming sales for AI memory chips can last.

title: Tesla Delays Debut of Advanced Driver-Assist Tech in China Again
title_cn: 特斯拉再次推迟先进驾驶辅助技术在中国的首次亮相
summary: Tesla Inc. pushed back the roll-out of its most advanced driver-assistance features in China, reflecting regulators’ caution in the world’s largest automobile market over the rapidly evolving technology.

title: SoftBank Seeks $10 Billion Loan Backed by OpenAI Shares
title_cn: 软银寻求 OpenAI 股票支持的 100 亿美元贷款
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. is seeking a $10 billion loan secured by its shares in US artificial intelligence giant OpenAI, people familiar with the matter said, as it takes on more debt for its push into AI.

title: Japan Mulls Social Media Age Limits as Global Curbs Spread
title_cn: 随着全球限制措施的蔓延，日本考虑社交媒体年龄限制
summary: Japan is considering imposing age-based restrictions on social media, joining a broader global push to manage risks to young users.

title: EQT Is Said to Explore Takeover of Japan’s $2.6 Billion Kakaku.com
title_cn: 据称殷拓集团将探索收购价值 26 亿美元的日本 Kakaku.com
summary: EQT AB is considering a takeover of Kakaku.com Inc., people familiar with the matter said, as private equity-led deals bloom in Japan.

title: Alibaba Adds China Eastern Flight Booking to Flagship Qwen App
title_cn: 阿里巴巴旗舰Qwen应用新增东航航班预订服务
summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd.’s Qwen AI app now helps users book China Eastern Airlines Corp. flights directly, the first time it’s opened its agentic AI technology to a major commercial partner.

title: Tencent, Alibaba in Talks to Join DeepSeek’s First Funding Round
title_cn: 腾讯、阿里巴巴洽谈加入 DeepSeek 首轮融资
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. and Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. are in discussions to join a maiden round of financing for Chinese AI pioneer DeepSeek, marking a milestone for the country’s artificial intelligence sector.

title: Leaderdrive Sees Profit Climb on Boom in Chinese Humanoid Robots
title_cn: Leaderdrive 看到中国人形机器人的繁荣，利润攀升
summary: Robotics component supplier Leader Harmonious Drive Systems Co. saw stronger profits last year and in the first quarter as demand soars for Chinese humanoid robots.

title: Microsoft Commits $18 Billion to Build Australian AI Capacity
title_cn: 微软承诺投入 180 亿美元建设澳大利亚人工智能能力
summary: Microsoft Corp. announced its biggest-ever investment in Australia, pledging to spend A$25 billion ($17.9 billion) by the end of 2029 as it pushes deeper into the artificial intelligence market in the Asia-Pacific region.

title: SK Hynix’s Profit Jumps on Soaring Prices of AI Chips
title_cn: AI芯片价格飙升，SK海力士利润猛增
summary:
SK Hynix Inc. reported a five-fold jump in quarterly profit and reiterated plans to ratchet up its capex “significantly” this year, underscoring surging prices of memory chips that underpin global artificial intelligence development.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tesla to Spend $3 Billion on ‘Research Fab,’ Use Intel Tech
title_cn: 特斯拉将斥资 30 亿美元建设“研究工厂”，采用英特尔技术
summary: Tesla Inc. plans to spend roughly $3 billion to build a research chip factory in Texas, according to Chief Executive Officer Elon Musk, an early phase of an effort to establish chip manufacturing at a massive scale.

title: Websites Selling Child Sex Abuse Doubled in 2025, Watchdog Says
title_cn: Watchdog 称，到 2025 年，销售儿童性虐待的网站将翻一番
summary: The number of websites illegally selling access to child sex abuse images more than doubled last year, according to new research from the UK authority responsible for finding and removing such material from the internet.

title: CDK Creditors Sign Pact as Software Company Profits Squeezed
title_cn: 软件公司利润受到挤压，CDK债权人签署协议
summary: Creditors to CDK Global have signed a cooperation agreement that binds them together in the event that the software company seeks talks on a potential debt deal, according to people familiar with the situation.

title: ServiceNow Falls After Reporting Sales Slowed by Mideast War
title_cn: ServiceNow 报告销售额因中东战争而放缓
summary: ServiceNow Inc. shares dropped in extended trading after the provider of software for business tasks reported results that disappointed investors and said some sales deals have been delayed by the war in the Middle East.

title: Texas Instruments Soars After Data Center Demand Buoys Sales
title_cn: 数据中心需求推动销售，德州仪器 (TI) 股价飙升
summary: Texas Instruments Inc. shares surged in late trading after the chipmaker gave a surprisingly strong forecast, helped by booming spending on data centers and industrial equipment.

title: Core Scientific Raises $3.3 Billion From AI Junk-Bond Offering
title_cn: Core Scientific 通过 AI 垃圾债券发行筹集 33 亿美元
summary: Core Scientific Inc. sold $3.3 billion in a high-yield note sale, marking the latest risky borrowing tied to AI infrastructure construction.

title: InfraCap's Hatfield Stands by 8,000 S&P 500 Price Target, US Exceptionalism
title_cn: InfraCap 的 Hatfield 维持 8,000 点标准普尔 500 指数价格目标，美国例外主义
summary: Jay Hatfield, Infrastructure Capital Advisors CEO and CIO, joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss his markets and macro outlook, including his year-end S&P 500 price target of 8,000 which he continues to stand by as markets hit new highs amid the Iran war. Hatfield also adds that even amid broader geopolitical tensions and higher energy prices, "The notion that the US has lost its exceptionalism is ridiculous." On Wednesday, stocks climbed to all-time highs as a slew of strong corporate results and President Donald Trump’s extension of a ceasefire with Iran revived risk appetites after a two-day retreat. Bitcoin rallied. The S&P 500’s 1% gain extended its advance for the month, set to be the best since 2020. Chipmakers climbed for a 16th straight day, the longest-ever winning streak. Hatfield speaks with Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rogers Hits Estimates, Boosts Cash Outlook on Spending Cut
title_cn: 罗杰斯达到预期，因削减支出而提振现金前景
summary: Rogers Communications Inc. matched analysts’ earnings estimates and raised its 2026 outlook for free cash flow as it cuts capital spending. The shares jumped the most in six years.

title: Tesla Benefiting From Soaring Oil Prices, Ross Gerber Says
title_cn: 罗斯·格伯表示，特斯拉受益于油价飙升
summary: Ross Gerber, co-founder and CEO of Gerber Kawasaki Wealth and Investment Management, says consumers have to be "crazy" to not want to drive an electric vehicle as oil prices surge while reacting to Tesla's latest earnings report on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tim Cook Regrets Maps Flub, Sees Apple Watch as His Proudest Work
title_cn: 蒂姆·库克对地图失误感到遗憾，认为 Apple Watch 是他最值得骄傲的作品
summary: Apple Inc. Chief Executive Officer Tim Cook, who plans to step down in a few months, cited the launch of Apple Maps on the iPhone in 2012 as his “first really big mistake” as the company’s boss.

title: Alex Cooper, Husband Skip Team Meeting After Behavior Complaints
title_cn: 亚历克斯·库珀 (Alex Cooper) 的丈夫因行为投诉而缺席团队会议
summary: Unwell, the media company founded by podcaster Alex Cooper and her husband, Matt Kaplan, held an all-hands meeting on Tuesday, amid concerns about the startup’s show launches, employee retention and complaints about Kaplan’s behavior.

title: AI Has Emboldened Child Predators, and Investigators Can't Keep Up
title_cn: 人工智能让儿童掠夺者变得更加大胆，调查人员无法跟上
summary: To find real kids in danger, law enforcement must sift through a surge of AI-generated sex imagery.

title: UK Budget Deficit at Three-Year Low But War Headwinds Build
title_cn: 英国预算赤字创三年新低但战争逆风加剧
summary: UK government borrowing dropped to the lowest level in three years, a boost for Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves that could be short-lived as the economic fallout from the Iran war spreads.

title: Hungary’s Incoming Cabinet Seeks to Cut Taxes and Fix Bank Ties
title_cn: 匈牙利即将上任的内阁寻求减税并修复银行关系
summary: Hungarian premier-elect Peter Magyar’s incoming cabinet plans to cut taxes for low earners and held talks to repair ties with banks that frayed under Viktor Orban’s tumultuous 16 years in power.

title: Australia’s Disability Reform to Spur Layoffs, Economists Warn
title_cn: 经济学家警告称，澳大利亚的残疾改革将刺激裁员
summary: Australia’s planned overhaul of its signature disability welfare program is set to see significant fallout for the labor market including a potential rise in unemployment, according to economists and industry players.

title: Israel-Lebanon Talks to Resume in Washington
title_cn: 以色列-黎巴嫩会谈将在华盛顿恢复
summary: Israel and Lebanon are set to resume talks Thursday in Washington. Israel and Hezbollah began a parallel war in March, with a ceasefire announced last week that runs through April 26. US Ambassador Mike Huckabee is expected to attend the talks, according to a State Department official. Bloomberg’s Dan Williams breaks down the situation.

title: Orban’s Exit Gives the EU a Chance to Change — If It Wants To
title_cn: 欧尔班的退出给了欧盟一个改变的机会——如果它愿意
summary: Viktor Orban’s imminent departure from the political stage has given the European Union a rare window for change.

title: Malaysia’s King Says He Will Choose a New Anti-Graft Chief
title_cn: 马来西亚国王表示他将选出新的反贪会主席
summary: Malaysia’s king said he would select a new anti-graft chief, the first official confirmation that current head Azam Baki’s term won’t be renewed when it ends next month.

title: Lessons From One of the World’s Greenest Cities
title_cn: 世界上最环保的城市之一的经验教训
summary: Sadiq Khan shares how he fought for environmental policies through a tumultuous decade as London’s mayor.

title: Navy Secretary Ousted After Infighting With Top Pentagon Leaders
title_cn: 海军部长因与五角大楼高层领导发生内讧而被免职
summary: Navy Secretary John Phelan was fired after clashing with top leaders at the Pentagon, including over administration efforts to revive US shipbuilding, according to people familiar with the matter, making him the latest high-profile Pentagon departure amid the war in Iran.

title: US Says No Deadline for Iran Proposal Amid Hormuz Standoff
title_cn: 美国表示在霍尔木兹海峡僵局中伊朗提案没有最后期限
summary: The US and Iran are locked in a battle for control of the Strait of Hormuz after failing to meet for a fresh round of peace talks, with both sides blocking the waterway to gain leverage during an extended ceasefire.

title: AI Export Control Measures Aimed at China Gain Steam in US House
title_cn: 针对中国的人工智能出口管制措施在美国众议院获得支持
summary: The House Foreign Affairs Committee advanced a slate of bipartisan export control bills Wednesday that show a growing appetite in Congress for restricting the flow of artificial intelligence technology to China, as the Trump administration has so far held back on significant new curbs.

title: US, Iran Deadlocked Over Hormuz | Balance of Power: Late Edition 04/22/2026
title_cn: 美国与伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡陷入僵局权力平衡：最新版 04/22/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Senator Tina Smith (D-MN) discusses how the conflict in the Middle East is creating "massive economic uncertainty" for her constituents and specifically details how farmers are significantly feeling the impact. Senator Roger Marshall (R-KS), a member of the Senate Agriculture and Budget Committees, defends staying the course in the Iran war, saying the US must “finish the job” to prevent a nuclear-armed Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Virginia Judge Blocks Redistricting Plan Approved by Voters
title_cn: 弗吉尼亚州法官阻止选民批准的选区重新划分计划
summary: A Virginia judge halted the implementation of a voter-approved plan to redraw the state’s congressional maps in a way that would have led to more US House seats for Democrats.

title: Kennedy Center’s New Chief Makes Case for Two-Year Closure
title_cn: 肯尼迪中心新任负责人提出关闭两年的理由
summary: The bust of John F. Kennedy will remain in the Grand Foyer and the opera house seats will still be red. But officials involved in plans to renovate the Kennedy Center say big changes are coming to the venue.

title: Peru Backtracks and Pays for F-16 Jets Following US Pressure
title_cn: 迫于美国压力，秘鲁收回购买 F-16 喷气式飞机的费用
summary: The Peruvian government moved forward with a contract to purchase new fighter jets, reversing course after the resignation of two key cabinet members and heavy pressure from the US.

title: US Could Own Up to 90% of Spirit in $500 Million Rescue Plan
title_cn: 5亿美元救助计划中，美国可能拥有烈酒高达90%的股份
summary: The Trump administration is nearing a rescue package for Spirit Airlines that could give the US government the option to own as much as 90% of the carrier once it emerges from bankruptcy, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Sen. Marshall: US Should ‘Finish the Job’ in Iran
title_cn: 参议员马歇尔：美国应该“完成”在伊朗的工作
summary: Senator Roger Marshall (R-KS), a member of the Senate Agriculture and Budget Committees, defends staying the course in the Iran war, saying the US must “finish the job” to prevent a nuclear-armed Iran even as Strait of Hormuz disruptions push up fuel costs and strain farmers. He also says Congress must pass a reconciliation bill “sooner than later” to keep DHS funded, signaling a vote-a-rama could begin as soon as Wednesday night, and warns he would be “disappointed” by cannabis rescheduling. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mexico Considering Bank Head Lazzeri as Top Diplomat in the US
title_cn: 墨西哥考虑将银行行长拉泽里任命为驻美国最高外交官
summary: President Claudia Sheinbaum is considering the head of two local development banks as a candidate for ambassador to the US, a move that would mark the second major personnel shift at the Foreign Ministry ahead of key trade talks, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Sen. Smith: War Creating Massive Economic Uncertainty
title_cn: 史密斯参议员：战争造成巨大的经济不确定性
summary: Senator Tina Smith (D-MN) discusses how the conflict in the Middle East is creating "massive economic uncertainty" for her constituents and specifically details how farmers are significantly feeling the impact. She criticizes the Trump Administration's military strategy and the ongoing debates around DHS funding and ICE reforms. Senator Smith speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Links France’s Border Plan Funding to Performance in New Deal
title_cn: 英国将法国边境计划资金与新政表现联系起来
summary: The UK and France have agreed a new £660 million ($891 million) deal aimed at reducing the flow of migrants crossing the English Channel, making British funding conditional on results for the first time.

title: Iran Fires on Hormuz Ships as US Navy Intercepts Oil Tankers
title_cn: 美国海军拦截油轮，伊朗向霍尔木兹船只开火
summary: Iranian gunboats fired on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz while the US intercepted two of the Islamic Republic’s oil tankers.

title: Palm Beach Billionaires Feud Over Who’s Really Protecting the Everglades
title_cn: 棕榈滩亿万富翁争论谁真正保护大沼泽地
summary: A plan by the influential Fanjul brothers to convert sugarcane fields in the Florida wetlands into a rock mine has angered fellow elites.

title: Chile’s Key Bill Set to Widen Deficit Regardless of Growth
title_cn: 无论经济增长如何，智利的关键法案都将扩大赤字
summary: Chile’s new government sent its flagship economic bill to congress Wednesday, with the budget office forecasting it would erode public finances throughout the administration’s four years in office.

title: CIA Deaths in Mexico Rekindle Security Tensions With US
title_cn: 中央情报局在墨西哥死亡事件重新引发与美国的安全紧张关系
summary: The death of US officials following an operation to dismantle a drug lab in northern Mexico is escalating tensions with Washington, as President Claudia Sheinbaum insists her government was unaware of their involvement.

title: RFK Jr. Downplays Benefits of Vaccines in Testy Senate Hearing
title_cn: 小罗伯特·肯尼迪在激烈的参议院听证会上淡化了疫苗的好处
summary: US Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. was challenged by Republican Senator Bill Cassidy in a congressional hearing after incorrectly claiming that a study showed vaccines didn’t help slash the US mortality rate last century.

title: One Big Midterm Risk for Trump, GOP: Democrats With Subpoena Power
title_cn: 特朗普和共和党面临的一大中期风险：民主党拥有传票权
summary: White House likely would face investigations if House flips

title: How Redistricting Is Reshaping US Political Battles
title_cn: 选区重新划分如何重塑美国政治斗争
summary: Voters’ approval of a map redrawing Virginia’s congressional district boundaries in Democrats’ favor marked one of the most significant developments in a yearlong nationwide battle that could determine which party controls the US House of Representatives.

title: Stocks Near Record Highs on Iran Truce Extension | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 4/22/2026
title_cn: 伊朗停战协议延期，股市接近历史新高彭博商业周刊日报 2026 年 4 月 22 日
summary: On today's episode of Bloomberg Businessweek Daily, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec discuss stocks sitting near record highs as President Trump extends the Iran ceasefire. Ray Takeyh, Senior Fellow for Middle East Studies at the Council on Foreign Relations, joins to discuss the US and Iran's "new normal" amid the indefinite ceasefire. Then, Bloomberg AI Editor Seth Fiegerman joins to discuss SpaceX saying it has an agreement to acquire AI startup Cursor. Then, Infrastructure Capital Advisors CEO and CIO Jay Hatfield joins to discuss his 2026 market outlook, and why he stands behind his year-end 8,000 S&P 500 price target. Finally, Suburban Propane CEO Michael Stivala on the company's 30th year as a publicly traded company, and customer demand for domestic propane. (Source: Bloomberg)
